docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RICARDO LARA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN DUNCAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. WHEN THE CASE WAS CALLED AT 4:25PM THE PLAINTIFF ASKED FOR A SPANISH INTERPRETER (AFTER I RELEASED THE SPANISH INTERPRETER FROM ANOTHER CASE I HAD ON THAT CALENDAR). THE DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER BROUGHT A STATE FARM AGENT TO THE HEARING WHO SPOKE SPANISH. I COULD NOT ALLOW IT AS IT COULD PRESENT A CONFLICT. HOWEVER SHE STATED THAT STATE FARM WAS THE INSURANCE FOR BOTH PARTIES AND THEREFORE I ASKED THE AND HE JUDGE ALLOWED IT. DEFENDANT RICARDO LARA WAS ASSISTED ROSA MELENDEZ A NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. MS. MELENDEZ WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. THE JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARA, RICARDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUNCAN, JOHN PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE MR. DUNCAN STRUCT HIS VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LARA, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT DUNCAN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUNCAN, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARA, RICARDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
